##RRUFFID=R110003

##LOCALITY=Tonopah-Belmont mine, Maricopa County, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Blue prismatic crystals associated with calcite

##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Bright phase is cerrusite.

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
